zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Pêche IV於大約1305年出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 比阿林斯時，他的父親Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Peche38歲，母親Iseult26歲。他於1330年與Joan de Weyland在英國素福爾可拉可福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年8月在英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 比阿林斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Pêche IV于大约1305年出生在英国素福爾可格亞特 比阿林斯时，他的父亲Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Peche38岁，母亲Iseult26岁。他于1330年与Joan de Weyland在英国素福爾可拉可福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年8月在英国英格兰素福爾可格亞特 比阿林斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pêche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Pêche IV was born about 1305, in Great Bealings, Suffolk, England, his father, Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Peche, was 38 and his mother, Iseult, was 26. He married Joan de Weyland in 1330, in Lackford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in August 1349, in Great Bealings, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Pêche IV est né environ 1305, à Great Bealings, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Peche, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Iseult, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Weyland en 1330, à Lackford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en août 1349, à Great Bealings, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Pêche IVが約1305年にイギリススフォルクグレアト ビーリングズで生まれた時，父Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Pecheは38歳，母Iseultは26歳であった。1330年にイギリススフォルクラクフォードでJoan de Weylandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年8月にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレアト ビーリングズで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Pêche IV(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 수폴크 그리트 빌링스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Peche(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Iseult(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1330년 영국 수폴크 랙퍼드에서 Joan de Weyland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그리트 빌링스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Pêche IV родился около 1305 г. в местности грит билингс, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert III Pecche 1st Lord Peche было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Iseult, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Weyland в 1330 г. в местности лаккфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер август 1349 г. в местности грит билингс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
